data.title: From Vacation To Legal Nightmare: How A Georgia Veteran's CBD Arrest In Dubai Landed Him Behind Bars
data.description: A retired Georgia Navy veteran faces drug trafficking charges in Dubai after being arrested for possessing medically prescribed CBD pills.
